debug_info.goal:
a : Type
⊢ ∀ (sl : SymList a), sl.fromSL.reverse = SymList.fromSL (Chapter3.SymList.reverse a sl)

proof:
by
  intro sl
  simp [SymList.reverse, List.zipWith]
  <;>
  simp_all [SymList.fromSL]
  <;>
  simp_all [List.zipWith]
  <;>
  simp_all [SymList.fromSL]
  <;>
  simp_all [List.zipWith]
  <;>
  simp_all [SymList.fromSL]
